content.text: UKSSSC Assistant Agriculture Officer Vacancy 2026 : Get complete details about UKSSSC Assistant Agriculture Officer Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Uttarakhand Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UKSSSC) Assistant Agriculture Officer (AAO) Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 77/UKSSSC/2026 Short Details
Notification Out : 25/05/2026 Starting Date : 01/06/2026 Last Date : 21/06/2026 11:59 PM Correction Date : 24-26 June 2026 Exam Date : 26/07/2026 (Tentative)
General / OBC : 300/- SC / ST / EWS : 150/- PH (Divyang) : 150/- Orphan (Anath) : 0/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : 21-42 Years Age Limit as on : 01/07/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Medical Examination Document Verification

Assistant Agriculture Officer (AAO) Grade-1 : Level-07 (Rs. 34,900-112,400/-) Assistant Agriculture Officer (AAO) Grade-3 : Level-04 (Rs. 25,500-81,100/-) Fodder Assistant Grade-3 : Level-04 (Rs. 25,500-81,100/-)

items: The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
